improvements: Transitions are consistent: transition-all and transition-colors used throughout with duration-200 as the primary timing (23 uses of transition-all, 19 of transition-colors)
Border radius is consistent: rounded-xl for cards/buttons, rounded-2xl for modals, rounded-lg for small elements
Hover states follow a consistent pattern: hover:bg-white/[0.08] for dark surfaces, hover:border-white/[0.12] for borders
Animation system is comprehensive with 12 keyframe definitions and utility classes (stagger-fade, slide-up, scale-in, etc.)
Focus rings use consistent accent color ring pattern across interactive elements
Color tokens are well-applied: bg-surface-1, bg-surface-2, text-neutral-300/400/500 hierarchy
Typography uses consistent text-[10px] uppercase tracking for labels, font-display for headings
Spacing follows Tailwind's scale consistently: gap-2/3 for groups, p-3/4 for containers, px-3/4 for inline padding
